What I do

Three ways to work together

01

Copywriting & Brand Strategy

You know what you do. Putting it into words is where things get complicated. I write brand messaging and website copy that sounds like you at your clearest, built to be found on Google (SEO), in AI answers (AEO), and in tools like ChatGPT (GEO).

Website copy · Brand messaging · Customer journey · SEO, AEO and GEO · Editing and rewriting

02

Longform & Editorial

If something isn't crystal clear, people switch off. I bring the same discipline to every piece: start with the human experience and give them a reason to keep reading until the end. Whether it's editorial content, science writing, or journal copy.

Editorial and culture writing · Research-based content · Journal concept and copy · Product storytelling

03

Books & Ghostwriting

Getting a story out of your head and onto the page takes more than good intentions. As a published children's book author and ghostwriter I guide the full process: from concept to finished manuscript, including story structure, tone, and illustrator notes.

Ghostwriting · Story development · Emotional and social themes · Writing coaching · Illustrator notes

All projects start from 350
and are quoted transparently based on scope.

About

The story behind the work

I grew up around entrepreneurship. My father started an upholstery business in the Caribbean in the 1960s with no blueprint, later continuing it successfully in the Netherlands. That shaped how I think about branding, storytelling, and building businesses that last. It also led me to a BSc in Communication, Design & Marketing.

Since the first year of university, I've worked in the field. I started by cold DMing local restaurants, sharing what I noticed and how I thought I could improve their marketing. That became my first clients. I had no portfolio, just sharp instincts and drive.

In 2022 I co-founded Prana, a mindfulness and events brand for Gen Z women. In 2023 my first children's book was published, and something shifted: proof that my words have real impact.

Since then, I've gone all in on my international copywriting business. I've worked for clients across the Netherlands, UK, US, and Australia as a copywriter, brand strategist, and writer with 10+ years of experience. Writing for children taught me quickly that if something isn't crystal clear, people switch off. Adults aren't that different. I'm especially drawn to people who genuinely care about what they're building. That level of conviction is still what motivates me most.

10+Years of experience
